"[18] RP GOT HOME AROUND 1930 / UNLOADED A NEW GATE HE BOUGHT - DROVE THE TRK TO FRNT OF HOUSE AND UNLOADED WOOD // HAD DINNER - THEN GOT UP AROUND 0345 TO PEE AND TRK WAS STILL THERE - THEN WOKE UP AT 0700 HRS AND TRK WAS GONE -- DECIDED TO DRIVE AROUND THE AREA AND NOTICED A WHITE TRK IN A DITCH MATCHING HIS VEH"

"[16] RP GOT IN HIS VEH AND STARTED DRVNG AROUND - JUST BOUGHT A HOUSE - 5463 HANKINS RD "

details.IncidentDetail: "[6] TREE BRANCH IS STILL ATTACHED TO TREE, WILL NEED TO BRING OUT A CHAIN SAW "
